meaning: 巴瑟斯特(冈比亚首都班珠尔
examples: Ms Bathurst also introduces the reader to some remarkable characters.
Wellington went to the village of Waterloo to draw up his report to Lord Bathurst.
Bella Bathurst made her name writing about the lighthouses built by the ancestors of Robert Louis Stevenson.
Brock has added the win to his nine victories in the Bathurst 1, 000, Australia's most famous race.
Stoner will drive for Red Bull Racing Australia in 2013, competing in a car which won the 2010 edition of the famous Bathurst motor race.
